description:
🧹 [code health improvement] Remove dead code in private-networks test

🎯 **What:** Removed commented-out unused block in `private-networks.test.ts`. Also resolved a syntax error and a missing function definition `evaluatePolicy` in `policy-engine.ts` that was causing CI pipeline to fail and blocking the main branch testing.
💡 **Why:** These changes improve the codebase's health by eliminating redundant lines that could cause confusion, and fixing the TS errors that block other validations.
✅ **Verification:** Verified by checking out the relevant components, checking linting/formatting rules, and running the core tests suite (`npm run verify:core`) successfully.
✨ **Result:** A cleaner test file and restored build tests functionality for the repository.

Signed-off-by: Jules <161369871+google-labs-jules[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
commit_message: chore: 🧹 [code health improvement] Remove dead code in private-networks test
